name: Ace of Cups
meaning_upright: New love, emotional beginning, compassion, overflowing heart, spiritual opening.
meaning_reversed: Blocked emotions, emptiness, repressed feelings, emotional loss, self-love needed.
love: new love, emotional opening, overflowing affection, deepening feelings
love_reversed: blocked emotions, repressed feelings, emotional loss, needing self-love
career: fulfilling opportunity, creative inspiration, emotionally rewarding work, positive workplace beginning
career_reversed: unfulfilling opportunity, emotional emptiness at work, blocked inspiration, missed connection
spiritual: spiritual opening, divine love, emotional renewal, deepening compassion
spiritual_reversed: blocked emotions, closed heart, needing self-love, spiritual emptiness

name: Two of Cups
meaning_upright: Partnership, mutual attraction, connection, harmony, union of equals.
meaning_reversed: Imbalance, broken connection, tension, miscommunication, self-partnership needed.
love: mutual love, emotional partnership, shared attraction, balanced connection
career: successful partnership, strong collaboration, professional agreement, shared career goals
career_reversed: broken partnership, tension, misaligned goals, poor collaboration
spiritual: soulful connection, spiritual partnership, energetic harmony, meeting through shared values
spiritual_reversed: broken connection, imbalance, needing self-partnership, disharmony

name: Three of Cups
meaning_upright: Celebration, friendship, community, joy shared, creative collaboration.
meaning_reversed: Overindulgence, third-party interference, isolation from friends, gossip, excess.
love: dating and socializing, joyful reunion, celebration with a partner, friendship becoming romantic
career: teamwork, professional networking, workplace celebration, supportive colleagues
career_reversed: isolation from the team, gossip, overindulgence, workplace cliques
spiritual: spiritual fellowship, shared joy, supportive community, gratitude expressed together
spiritual_reversed: isolation from community, excess, shallow connection, lost fellowship

name: Four of Cups
meaning_upright: Apathy, contemplation, disconnection, missed offer, reevaluation.
meaning_reversed: Renewed interest, accepting the offer, emerging from withdrawal, new motivation, openness.
love: emotional withdrawal, romantic dissatisfaction, overlooking an opportunity, feeling disconnected
love_reversed: renewed interest, accepting an offer, emerging from withdrawal, openness
career: career dissatisfaction, workplace boredom, overlooked opportunity, need for renewed motivation
career_reversed: renewed motivation, accepting an opportunity, re-engagement, fresh interest
spiritual: spiritual apathy, inward withdrawal, overlooked guidance, renewing emotional receptivity
spiritual_reversed: renewed openness, accepting guidance, emerging from apathy, fresh receptivity

name: Five of Cups
meaning_upright: Loss, grief, regret, focusing on what's gone, disappointment.
meaning_reversed: Acceptance, moving on, forgiveness, seeing what remains, healing.
love: heartbreak, regret in love, grieving a relationship, focusing on emotional loss
career: professional disappointment, missed opportunity, career regret, learning from setbacks
career_reversed: moving on from setbacks, acceptance, learning from loss, recovery
spiritual: spiritual lessons through grief, acceptance of loss, emotional release, noticing what remains
spiritual_reversed: acceptance, forgiveness, seeing what remains, emotional healing

name: Six of Cups
meaning_upright: Nostalgia, childhood, innocence, reunion, simple kindness.
meaning_reversed: Stuck in the past, rose-tinted memory, leaving home, growing up, releasing old ties.
love: past love, romantic nostalgia, reunion with an ex, innocent affection
love_reversed: stuck in the past, idealized memory, releasing old ties, growing up
career: returning to a former career, familiar workplace, mentoring others, nostalgia influencing career choices
career_reversed: clinging to the familiar, releasing old roles, nostalgia fading, moving forward
spiritual: healing the inner child, ancestral memories, spiritual innocence, reconnecting with simple joy
spiritual_reversed: releasing the past, outgrowing old comforts, healing memory, moving forward

name: Seven of Cups
meaning_upright: Choices, fantasy, illusion, wishful thinking, options.
meaning_reversed: Clarity, decision made, cutting through illusion, overwhelm ending, realism.
love: romantic options, fantasy and idealization, unclear intentions, difficulty choosing a partner
love_reversed: clarity, decision made, illusions fading, realism
career: many career options, unrealistic expectations, scattered focus, choosing a practical path
career_reversed: clear choice, focus returning, cutting through options, realism
spiritual: spiritual discernment, separating intuition from fantasy, many possible paths, grounding imagination
spiritual_reversed: clarity returning, illusions fading, grounded discernment, decision made

name: Eight of Cups
meaning_upright: Walking away, seeking deeper meaning, leaving behind, disillusionment, quest.
meaning_reversed: Fear of leaving, returning, avoidance, staying too long, unfinished departure.
love: walking away from a relationship, seeking deeper fulfillment, emotional detachment, leaving what no longer satisfies
love_reversed: fear of leaving, staying too long, avoidance, unfinished departure
career: leaving an unfulfilling job, seeking meaningful work, career transition, moving beyond stagnation
career_reversed: fear of leaving, staying in stagnation, avoidance, unfinished transition
spiritual: leaving an empty path, seeking deeper meaning, spiritual pilgrimage, releasing emotional attachment
spiritual_reversed: fear of moving on, avoidance, staying in an empty path, unfinished search

name: Nine of Cups
meaning_upright: Wishes fulfilled, contentment, satisfaction, pleasure, gratitude.
meaning_reversed: Superficial happiness, greed, unfulfilled wishes, smugness, inner lack.
love: romantic satisfaction, emotional pleasure, receiving desired affection, enjoying love
love_reversed: superficial satisfaction, unmet wishes, inner lack, complacency
career: career satisfaction, desired professional outcome, rewarding achievement, enjoying success
career_reversed: hollow success, unmet goals, complacency, inner dissatisfaction
spiritual: spiritual contentment, gratitude, emotional fulfillment, appreciating present blessings
spiritual_reversed: superficial contentment, unmet longing, inner lack, misplaced desire

name: Ten of Cups
meaning_upright: Lasting happiness, family harmony, emotional fulfillment, love realized, belonging.
meaning_reversed: Family discord, broken harmony, unrealistic ideals, disconnection at home, strained bonds.
love: lasting happiness, emotional security, harmonious family life, fulfilled partnership
love_reversed: family discord, broken harmony, strained bonds, unrealistic ideals
career: harmonious workplace, meaningful career, supportive team, long-term professional fulfillment
career_reversed: disconnection at work, broken team harmony, misaligned values, strain
spiritual: spiritual harmony, shared emotional fulfillment, loving community, alignment of heart and home
spiritual_reversed: broken harmony, misaligned ideals, disconnection at home, strained belonging

name: Page of Cups
meaning_upright: Emotional openness, creative message, intuition budding, sensitivity, sweet surprise.
meaning_reversed: Emotional immaturity, moodiness, blocked creativity, escapism, oversensitivity.
love: sweet romantic message, innocent crush, emotional vulnerability, unexpected expression of affection
career: creative study, encouraging career news, beginner opportunity, intuitive professional idea
career_reversed: blocked creativity, moody messages, immaturity, escapism
spiritual: intuitive message, gentle spiritual awakening, emotional openness, creative sensitivity
spiritual_reversed: blocked intuition, emotional immaturity, escapism, oversensitivity

name: Knight of Cups
meaning_upright: Romance, charm, invitation, following the heart, idealism.
meaning_reversed: Unrealistic promises, moodiness, disillusionment, flattery, heart over head gone wrong.
love: romantic proposal, heartfelt pursuit, charm and affection, following the heart
love_reversed: unrealistic promises, moodiness, disillusionment, empty charm
career: following a vocation, persuasive proposal, creative profession, idealistic career move
career_reversed: unrealistic proposals, moodiness, disillusionment, wavering commitment
spiritual: following the heart’s calling, devotional journey, spiritual idealism, offering compassion
spiritual_reversed: disillusionment, unrealistic idealism, wavering devotion, heart over head gone wrong

name: Queen of Cups
meaning_upright: Compassion, emotional depth, intuition, nurturing presence, empathy.
meaning_reversed: Emotional overwhelm, codependency, martyrdom, boundaries dissolved, manipulation through feeling.
love: deep emotional support, intuitive love, compassion, strong emotional connection
love_reversed: emotional overwhelm, codependency, dissolved boundaries, martyrdom
career: empathetic leadership, caring profession, emotional intelligence, supportive workplace
career_reversed: emotional overwhelm, poor boundaries, over-giving, depletion
spiritual: deep intuition, compassionate presence, emotional wisdom, receptive spiritual awareness
spiritual_reversed: dissolved boundaries, emotional overwhelm, codependency, martyrdom

name: King of Cups
meaning_upright: Emotional mastery, calm authority, diplomacy, balance of heart and head, wise counsel.
meaning_reversed: Repressed emotion, coldness, manipulation, moodiness in power, emotional volatility.
love: emotionally mature love, steady affection, balanced feelings, compassionate partnership
love_reversed: repressed emotion, coldness, moodiness, emotional volatility
career: diplomatic leadership, calm management, emotional maturity, balancing people and results
career_reversed: emotional volatility, coldness, manipulation, poor composure
spiritual: emotional mastery, compassionate leadership, balanced spirituality, calm inner authority
spiritual_reversed: repressed emotion, imbalance, volatility beneath calm, disconnection from feeling
